# truenas_keychain_credential (Data Source)

Provides information about a TrueNAS keychain credential (SSH keypair or
connection). Credential attributes are surfaced as a JSON string because they
may contain private-key material.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_keychain_credential" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "keychain_type" {
  value = data.truenas_keychain_credential.example.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric keychain credential ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `attributes_json` (String, Sensitive) Credential attributes as an opaque JSON string. May contain sensitive private-key material.
- `name` (String) Credential name.
- `type` (String) Credential type (SSH_KEY_PAIR, SSH_CREDENTIALS).
